data.title: NYPD Warns About 'Wanted' Posters Targeting Finance Executives, And Crossed-Out UnitedHealthcare CEO (UPDATED)
data.description: The NYPD has issued a warning about threats to healthcare executives following the murder of UnitedHealth CEO Brian Thompson, highlighting the circulation of "Wanted" posters and rising security concerns amidst extremist reactions online.

data.title: Chainlink Price Soars 22% On President-Elect Donald Trump's World Liberty Financial Purchases: How High Can LINK Go?
data.description: Chainlink (CRYPTO: LINK) soared 22% in 24 hours, bringing its month-over-month performance to 93% as fundamental developments point to a bullish future.

data.title: Adobe Shares Plunges Over 11% After Disappointing Revenue Forecast
data.description: Adobe released its fourth-quarter financial results after the market closed on Wednesday.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Broadcom Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: Broadcom offers an annual dividend yield of 1.16%. How can investors exploit its dividend yield to pocket a regular $500 monthly?

data.title: SMCI Stock Receives Harshest Price Target Among 17 Tracked Analysts As JPMorgan Maintains Underweight Rating On Super Micro: 'No Significant Movement Of Orders'
data.description: JPMorgan maintained its 'Underweight' rating on Supermicro Computer and reaffirmed its $23 price target after a meeting with management.
